scripts.validate:projects: rm -rf .tmp-project-registry && tsc --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-project-registry scripts/validate-project-registry.ts scripts/schedule-project-registry-validation.ts lib/projects/health.ts && node .tmp-project-registry/scripts/validate-project-registry.js
scripts.ops:project-health: rm -rf .tmp-project-registry && tsc --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-project-registry scripts/schedule-project-registry-validation.ts lib/projects/health.ts && node .tmp-project-registry/scripts/schedule-project-registry-validation.js
